📱 AuraVisionEngine.kt

package com.companion.aura

import android.graphics.Bitmap
import android.os.Handler
import android.os.Looper
import android.view.PixelCopy
import android.view.Window

class AuraVisionEngine {
    interface VisionCallback {
        fun onScreenParsed(contextText: String)
    }

    fun parseActiveScreen(window: Window, callback: VisionCallback) {
        try {
            val bitmap = Bitmap.createBitmap(
                window.decorView.width, 
                window.decorView.height, 
                Bitmap.Config.ARGB_8888
            )
            PixelCopy.request(window, bitmap, { copyResult ->
                if (copyResult == PixelCopy.SUCCESS) {
                    val extractedText = runLocalInference(bitmap)
                    callback.onScreenParsed(extractedText)
                }
            }, Handler(Looper.getMainLooper()))
        } catch (e: Exception) { e.printStackTrace() }
    }

    private fun runLocalInference(bitmap: Bitmap): String {
        // On-Device ML Kit Text Recognition v2
        return "User is viewing schedule details."
    }
}

🧠 AuraBrain.kt

enum class CompanionState {
    AMBIENT_HOVER,    // 1554.jpg / 1557.jpg
    THINKING,         // 1528.png / 1527.png  
    FOCUSED_ASSIST    // 1552.jpg / 1559.jpg
}

class AuraBrain(private val listener: StateChangeListener) {
    interface StateChangeListener {
        fun onStateTransition(
            newState: CompanionState, 
            assetName: String, 
            dialogPrompt: String
        )
    }

    fun processScreenContext(screenText: String) {
        when {
            screenText.contains("schedule") || 
            screenText.contains("birthday") -> {
                transitionTo(FOCUSED_ASSIST, "1552.jpg",
                    "I noticed you're looking at the schedule. " +
                    "Want me to coordinate calendar updates?")
            }
            screenText.contains("processing") -> {
                transitionTo(THINKING, "1528.png", 
                    "Syncing your data streams now...")
            }
            else -> {
                transitionTo(AMBIENT_HOVER, "1554.jpg", "")
            }
        }
    }
}

🎨 AuraOverlayLayout.kt

class AuraOverlayLayout(context: Context) : LinearLayout(context) {
    private val avatarView: ImageView
    private val dialogBubble: TextView

    init {
        orientation = VERTICAL
        gravity = Gravity.CENTER_HORIZONTAL

        dialogBubble = TextView(context).apply {
            visibility = View.GONE
            setTextColor(Color.WHITE)
            textSize = 14f
            setPadding(24, 16, 24, 16)
            maxWidth = 450
            background = GradientDrawable().apply {
                setColor(Color.parseColor("#CC111122"))
                cornerRadius = 24f
                setStroke(2, Color.parseColor("#88AEEFFF"))
            }
        }

        avatarView = ImageView(context).apply {
            layoutParams = LayoutParams(200, 200)
            setImageResource(R.drawable.aura_ambient_pose)
        }

        addView(dialogBubble)
        addView(avatarView)
    }
}
